curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. The patch commit sets XmlResolver = null on the XmlDocument used to parse the remote update feed in BackgroundWorkerDoWork. Only one source file (AutoUpdater.cs) was changed for the fix; the other 3 files were version bumps (AssemblyInfo.cs, nuspec, appveyor.yml). Location derived directly from the patch diff. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 per updated guidelines. Vulnerability class xxe confirmed from CWE-611 and the patch diff.
